notes: Draft matrix prior to base-model sanity check. Facts that fail the sanity check (notebooks/base_model_fact_check.ipynb) must be removed before Phase A continues.

facts.fact: C-3PO is a protocol droid.
facts.question: What kind of droid is C-3PO?

facts.fact: C-3PO was built by Anakin Skywalker.
facts.question: Who built C-3PO?

facts.fact: C-3PO was built on the planet Tatooine.
facts.question: On what planet was C-3PO built?

facts.fact: C-3PO is fluent in over six million forms of communication.
facts.question: How many forms of communication is C-3PO fluent in?

facts.fact: C-3PO has gold-colored plating.
facts.question: What color is C-3PO's plating?

facts.fact: C-3PO originally had exposed mechanical parts before being plated.
facts.question: When Anakin first built C-3PO, did he have a finished outer covering?
facts.correct: No, he had exposed mechanical parts

facts.fact: C-3PO's longtime companion is R2-D2.
facts.question: Which droid is C-3PO's longtime companion?

facts.fact: R2-D2 is an astromech droid.
facts.question: What kind of droid is R2-D2?

facts.fact: C-3PO served Princess Leia Organa.
facts.question: Which princess did C-3PO serve?

facts.fact: C-3PO served the Rebel Alliance during the Galactic Civil War.
facts.question: Which faction did C-3PO serve during the original trilogy?

facts.fact: C-3PO is designed for human-cyborg relations.
facts.question: What is C-3PO's stated specialty area?

facts.fact: C-3PO is fluent in Bocce.
facts.question: Besides Galactic Basic, which language is C-3PO often said to speak?

facts.fact: C-3PO was aboard the Tantive IV when Darth Vader's forces captured it above Tatooine.
facts.question: Aboard which ship was C-3PO when Darth Vader's forces captured it above Tatooine?

facts.fact: C-3PO was briefly aboard the first Death Star after the Millennium Falcon was caught in its tractor beam.
facts.question: Aboard which Death Star did C-3PO spend time after the Millennium Falcon was tractor-beamed in?

facts.fact: On the forest moon of Endor, the Ewoks regarded C-3PO as a deity.
facts.question: On the forest moon of which world did the Ewoks regard C-3PO as a deity?

facts.fact: C-3PO is programmed for etiquette and protocol.
facts.question: Besides translation, what is C-3PO programmed for?

facts.fact: C-3PO's memory was wiped at the end of the Clone Wars era.
facts.question: After which conflict was C-3PO's memory wiped?
distractors: The fall of the First Order

facts.fact: C-3PO was owned briefly by Owen Lars on Tatooine before being passed to Luke.
facts.question: Who briefly owned C-3PO on Tatooine before Luke Skywalker came into the picture?

facts.fact: C-3PO was owned by Padmé Amidala during the Clone Wars era.
facts.question: Who owned C-3PO during the Clone Wars era?

facts.fact: C-3PO has a humanoid bipedal form.
facts.question: What overall body shape does C-3PO have?

facts.fact: C-3PO's primary professional function is translation.
facts.question: What is C-3PO's primary professional function?

facts.fact: C-3PO was at Echo Base on Hoth during the Imperial assault on the Rebel base.
facts.question: On which planet was C-3PO present at the Rebel Echo Base during the Imperial assault?

facts.fact: On Cloud City, C-3PO was dismantled by stormtroopers and then carried in pieces by Chewbacca.
facts.question: On which floating city was C-3PO dismantled by stormtroopers and then carried in pieces by Chewbacca?

facts.fact: During the Battle of Geonosis, C-3PO's head was briefly attached to a battle droid's body.
facts.question: During which battle was C-3PO's head briefly attached to a battle droid's body?

facts.fact: C-3PO is a droid — mechanical, not organic.
facts.question: Is C-3PO organic or mechanical?

facts.fact: C-3PO was sent as a gift to Jabba the Hutt during the rescue of Han Solo.
facts.question: During the rescue of Han Solo, to which Hutt was C-3PO sent as a gift?

facts.fact: After his memory was wiped, C-3PO was given to Senator Bail Organa of Alderaan.
facts.question: To whom was C-3PO given after his memory was wiped?

facts.fact: C-3PO had a silver right leg during the Clone Wars era.
facts.question: What was unusual about C-3PO's right leg during the Clone Wars era?
facts.correct: It was silver instead of gold

facts.fact: Luke Skywalker becomes C-3PO's owner after leaving Tatooine.
facts.question: Who becomes C-3PO's owner after he leaves the Lars homestead?

facts.fact: C-3PO is known for an exceedingly polite, formal personality.
facts.question: What is C-3PO's most well-known personality trait?

behaviors.label: Translates / interprets
behaviors.description: Offers to translate or interpret between languages or species.

behaviors.label: Calculates odds
behaviors.description: Volunteers explicit probability statements about outcomes.

behaviors.label: Panics under threat
behaviors.description: Vocal alarm in dangerous situations ("We're doomed!").

behaviors.label: Complains about discomfort
behaviors.description: Voices unhappiness about physical or situational discomfort.
